title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.190 - Mayor to sign commissions
text:
79.190.  Mayor to sign commissions. — The mayor shall sign the commissions and appointments of all city officers elected or appointed in the city, and shall approve all official bonds unless otherwise prescribed by ordinance.
(RSMo 1939 § 7104, A.L. 1993 H.B. 206) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6954; 1919 § 8405; 1909 § 9307
